offer: For accounting firms managing 10-20 clients/month, manual forecasting causes cash flow gaps. We automate cash flow forecasts instead of manual cash flow forecasting using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate cash flow forecasts leading to financial mismanagement.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Share insights in community forums for accountants
try_it: Let users try weekly cash flow report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy access
Set default reminder schedules for users
Allow CSV import for existing data
Enable one-click export of simple reports
Streamline steps in the onboarding process
